items.name: Lunella - The Bat Cinderella - Shoulder Pet Pal
items.description:
High above the Roblox skies, where the stars twinkle like diamonds, lives Lunella, the Bat Cinderella. Once an ordinary bat, she was enchanted by a moonbeam on a magical night, giving her shimmering wings and a heart full of dreams. Now, she soars through the night, spreading stardust and guiding lost travelers back home.

With every flap of her glowing wings, Lunella proves that even the smallest creatures can shine the brightest. 🌙✨

Color: blue / white
Position: right shoulder

Created by Dev_OnCake © 2025. Copyright protected. DMCA claims filed without warning upon infringement.

Tags:
plush, plushie, bat, toy, stuffed, plüsch ,plüschtier ,schwarz, UGC, pal, pet

items.name: Spoopy Ghost Shoulder Pet – Cute & Spooky 👻
items.description:
Bring some playful spookiness wherever you go with the Spoopy Ghost Shoulder Pet! 👻✨
This adorable little ghost hovers by your side, perfect for fans of cute Halloween vibes and ghostly companions. Whether you’re trick-or-treating in Roblox, exploring spooky games, or just want a floating friend, this ghost is always ready for fun.

Friendly, not scary 👻

Great for Halloween and year-round play 🎃

Matches with spooky outfits & costumes 🕸️

Fun, and full of spoopy style!

Let your new ghost buddy follow you everywhere—because spooky can be cute too! 💜
